productDisplayName: Basics Men Red & Black Checked Slim Fit Shirt
description: Style NotePerfect for urban dressing, this shirt from basics oozes attitude and style. The fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day, while the stylish stitch detailing makes it a perfect casual wear. Team this shirt with jeans or chinos and leather shoes for unparalleled cool.Product DetailsRed, black, grey and white checked shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, full buttoned placket, a patch pocket on the left chest with flap button closure, branding appliqued on the pocket and a curved hemMaterial and Care100% CottonMachine wash cold using a mild detergentDo not soakDry flat in shadeWarm ironSize and FitSlim fitThe model (height 6' and shoulder 18") is wearing a size L
